description: Merge two document DataFrames on a key column, designed for document-style data with nested columns.

inputs.description: Two input DataFrames (left and right) to merge

left_asset_key.label: Left Asset Key
left_asset_key.description: Asset key for the left DataFrame

right_asset_key.label: Right Asset Key
right_asset_key.description: Asset key for the right DataFrame

partition_type.label: Partition Type
partition_type.description: Enable partitioning: 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'hourly' for time-based; 'static' for a fixed set of values (e.g. customers); 'multi' for date × static (e.g. day × customer). Leave empty for unpartitioned.

partition_start.label: Partition Start Date
partition_start.description: ISO date string for the first partition, e.g. '2024-01-01'. Required for time-based and multi partition types.

partition_date_column.label: Partition Date Column
partition_date_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current date partition key (e.g. 'event_date', 'created_at').

partition_values.label: Partition Values
partition_values.description: Comma-separated values for static or multi partitioning, e.g. 'acme_corp,globex,initech'. Required for static and multi types.

partition_static_dim.label: Static Dimension Name
partition_static_dim.description: Name for the static partition dimension in multi-partitioning, e.g. 'customer' or 'region'. Defaults to 'segment'.

partition_static_column.label: Static Partition Column
partition_static_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current static partition value (e.g. 'customer_id', 'region').

on.label: On
on.description: Join key column(s). Can be a single column name or a list.

suffixes.label: Suffixes
suffixes.description: Two-element list of suffixes for overlapping column names

flatten_result.label: Flatten Result
flatten_result.description: Auto-flatten any nested dict columns after the merge
